acceptance_targets: [chapter_07_prose_001] Pass if the revised versions of the passages currently anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:53, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:61, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:181, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:189, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:193, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:269 are all rendered as complete sentences with a subject and verb, and if a read-through of the whole chapter finds no more than two remaining standalone narration fragments of the same noun-label or "Not X" type. Fail if three or more such clipped narration beats still remain, especially at those target passages.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised versions of the passages currently anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:53, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:61, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:181, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:189, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:193, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:269 are all rendered as complete sentences with a subject and verb, and if a read-through of the whole chapter finds no more than two remaining standalone narration fragments of the same noun-label or "Not X" type. Fail if three or more such clipped narration beats still remain, especially at those target passages.
findings.problem: The narration repeatedly hardens into clipped noun-phrase and negative fragments (for example, "Too quiet.", "The bastard.", "Blank paper.", "One date. One initial.", "Not safety.", and "Not who sent you."). Because the pattern recurs across the chapter, it reads as a visible prose tic rather than a one-off pressure beat, flattening cadence and violating the constitution's ban on clipped narration.
findings.rewrite_direction: At snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:53, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:61, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:181, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:189, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:193, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_07.md:269, recast the fragment beats as full grammatical sentences that still preserve Elise's pressure and speed. Replace the recurring "Not X"/label-fragment sharpening move with syntactic variety so urgency comes from embodied thought and action rather than from repeated truncation.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Prioritize structural and craft blockers first: causality, chapter architecture, stakes clarity, continuity logic, and all HIGH/CRITICAL defects.
revision_pass.label: HIGH/CRITICAL structural/craft fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into the contradiction that tenderness can coexist with surveillance, desire with betrayal, and ideology with vanity. Render violence, sex, illness, and poverty at the scale characters actually experience them. When an edge case appears, choose the more specific and less reputationally safe version if it remains faithful to character, period, and causality.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene reaches bodily danger, sex, grief, class shame, or political cruelty and then retreats into summary, rewrite toward the exact physical and social fact the character cannot evade.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: Moderate to high; contractions are the spoken default, with full forms reserved for period formality, deliberate emphasis, or Vautrin's cultivated precision.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate compressive surveillance chapters with slower communal or reflective chapters; vary scene count, dialogue density, and whether the turn comes from action, information, dread, or aftermath so no two adjacent chapters run on the same structural rhythm.
prose_style_profile.diction: Historically grounded and unsentimental; plain enough for labor and bureaucracy, lyrical only when perception earns it rather than rhetoric.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third centered on Elise, elastic enough to register class texture, political pressure, and the quarry's collective life without drifting into authorial essay.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Supple, image-bearing sentences broken by hard factual beats at moments of violence, lust, bureaucratic coercion, or shame.
